records.question: Which categories include products supplied exactly by Aux joyeux ecclésiastiques?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT categories.categoryid FROM categories
JOIN products ON categories.categoryid = products.categoryid
JOIN suppliers ON products.supplierid = suppliers.supplierid
WHERE suppliers.suppliername = 'Aux joyeux ecclésiastiques'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.CategoryID
FROM Categories c
JOIN Products p ON c.CategoryID = p.CategoryID
JOIN Suppliers s ON p.SupplierID = s.SupplierID
WHERE s.SupplierName = 'Aux joyeux ecclésiastiques'
AND c.CategoryID NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT c2.CategoryID
    FROM Categories c2
    JOIN Products p2 ON c2.CategoryID = p2.CategoryID
    JOIN Suppliers s2 ON p2.SupplierID = s2.SupplierID
    WHERE s2.SupplierName != 'Aux joyeux ecclésiastiques'
    AND c2.CategoryID IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT c3.CategoryID
        FROM Categories c3
        JOIN Products p3 ON c3.CategoryID = p3.CategoryID
        JOIN Suppliers s3 ON p3.SupplierID = s3.SupplierID
        WHERE s3.SupplierName = 'Aux joyeux ecclésiastiques'
    )
)

records.question: Which categories include products that have a unit exactly equal to 24 - 250 g pkgs?

records.question: Which categories include products that have a unit size of exactly 24 pieces?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT categories.categoryid FROM categories
JOIN products ON categories.categoryid = products.categoryid
WHERE products.unit = '24 pieces'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.CategoryID
FROM Categories c
JOIN Products p ON c.CategoryID = p.CategoryID
WHERE p.Unit LIKE '%24%' AND p.Unit LIKE '%piece%'

records.question: Which categories include the product Tofu with a unit size of 40 - 100 g pkgs. supplied by vendors located in Osaka?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT categories.categoryid FROM categories
JOIN products ON categories.categoryid = products.categoryid
JOIN suppliers ON products.supplierid = suppliers.supplierid
WHERE products.productname = 'Tofu' AND products.unit = '40 - 100 g pkgs.' AND suppliers.city = 'Osaka'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.CategoryID

JOIN Suppliers s ON p.SupplierID = s.SupplierID
WHERE p.ProductName = 'Tofu'
AND p.Unit = '40 - 100 g pkgs.'
AND s.City = 'Osaka'

records.question: Which categories have the name Produce and include a description containing Dried fruit and bean curd?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT categories.categoryid FROM categories
WHERE categories.categoryname = 'Produce' AND categories.description LIKE '%Dried fruit and bean curd%'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT CategoryID
FROM Categories
WHERE CategoryName = 'Produce' AND Description LIKE '%Dried fruit%' AND Description LIKE '%bean curd%'

records.question: Which categories named Confections include the product Tarte au sucre priced exactly at 49.3 with a unit of 48 pies supplied by Chantal Goulet whose phone is (514) 555-2955?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT categories.categoryid FROM categories
JOIN products ON categories.categoryid = products.categoryid
JOIN suppliers ON products.supplierid = suppliers.supplierid
WHERE products.price = 49.3 AND categories.categoryname = 'Confections' AND suppliers.phone = '(514) 555-2955' AND products.productname = 'Tarte au sucre' AND suppliers.contactname = 'Chantal Goulet' AND products.unit = '48 pies'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.CategoryID
FROM Categories c
JOIN Products p ON c.CategoryID = p.CategoryID
JOIN Suppliers s ON p.SupplierID = s.SupplierID
WHERE c.CategoryName = 'Confections'
  AND p.ProductName = 'Tarte au sucre'
  AND p.Price = 49.3
  AND p.Unit = '48 pies'
  AND s.ContactName = 'Chantal Goulet'
  AND s.Phone = '(514) 555-2955'
